name: @sqleasy/dart-query
description: Turbo shim for the Dart query port (pub.dev: sqleasy). Pulls NO node dependencies — it exists only so turbo can schedule and cache the Dart toolchain as a task-graph node. The real package is defined by pubspec.yaml.

scripts.embed: dart pub get && dart run tool/embed_goldens.dart
scripts.test: dart pub get && dart run tool/verify_embed.dart && dart test && dart test -p chrome
